response.overview: Newsreel footage of Canadian headlines. Shots include: a spectacular fire in Hull, Quebec which destroyed the Interprovincial Bridge; Dionne Quintuplets in Grade Five; Operation Musk-Ox; spy ring uncovered by the RCMP; Barbara Ann Scott skating at championship; highlights of a Boston Bruins versus Montreal Canadiens hockey game as they battle for the Stanley Cup; Canada's New Governor General greeted by King; 67th running of the King's Plate horse race at Woodbine race track; Vancouver, British Columbia celebrates its Diamond Jubilee; hurricane strikes Windsor, Ontario; HMCS Warrior in Halifax, Nova Scotia; Boy Scouts and Girl Guides gathering; Hamilton, Oontario celebrates its Centennial; etc.
response.title: Canadian Headlines of 1946
